component.name: Mint Agent
component.summary: A native Tauri desktop AI assistant with a Rust backend and React UI

description.p: Mint Agent is a native desktop AI assistant built on Tauri. It features a modern, reactive React UI and a powerful Rust backend to assist you with tasks, run local command orchestrations, perform screen captures, and run workflows seamlessly.

ul.li: High performance and lightweight memory footprint.
Smart context integration and tool execution.
Multi-provider AI chat and image generation tools.

screenshot.caption: Mint Agent main chat interface and workspaces
